Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are provided events with timestamp activity resource department patient age patient gender additional info Our job Based on event attributes like timestamps patient age patient gender etc group them into cases

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: They belong to three distinct patients with ages 45 M male in ER 62 F female and 28 M male who goes to Surgery

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For the first set of events Register at ER for Age 45 Gender M Then later we see an initial triage for a 45 M in ER Then an X ray imaging event with 45 M Then doctor consultation for age 45 M And then a Patient discharged event for ER with 45 M So case group 1 is events 1 4 7 12 15

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The sequence registration in ER triage imaging doctor consult discharge all for a patient with id 45M in ER But note that one of the doctor consultations says diagnosis hairline fracture It is consistent

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For patient Age 62 female Registration at ER for age 62 F Then initial triage for 62F in ER Then lab test requested and then lab test completed doctor consultation with diagnosis of minor infection prescription created and patient discharged

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For patient Age 28 male Registration event for surgery Then doctor consultation in Surgery with scheduled knee surgery then surgery preparation then surgery performed then recovery room and finally patient discharged from surgery

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So that yields case group 3 events 3 6 9 13 16 and 18

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Double check time sequence For group A events Registration at ER Initial triage in ER X ray imaging Doctor consultation in ER Patient discharged from ER The sequence seems plausible Group B Registration in ER Initial triage in ER Lab test requested Lab test completed Doctor consultation Prescription created Patient discharged Group C Registration in Surgery Doctor consultation Surgery preparation Surgery performed Recovery room event Patient discharged

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The idea is to look at unique patient attributes age and gender and department context for registration Also sequence order Registration always comes first then triage or consultation then diagnostic tests then procedure if needed

Name: Validation - PE
Text: There are three unique patients identified by the combination of age and gender but also department seems to matter
